mapper.select: select ai.asset_type, count(1) as asset_count, coalesce(sum(af.original_value), 0.00) as original_value_total from asset_info ai left join asset_finance af on af.asset_id = ai.asset_id where ai.del_flag is null or ai.del_flag != '2' group by ai.asset_type order by ai.asset_type asc

select ai.asset_status, count(1) as asset_count, coalesce(sum(af.original_value), 0.00) as original_value_total from asset_info ai left join asset_finance af on af.asset_id = ai.asset_id where ai.del_flag is null or ai.del_flag != '2' group by ai.asset_status order by ai.asset_status asc

select ai.use_dept_id as dept_id, coalesce(sd.dept_name, concat('部门#', ai.use_dept_id)) as dept_name, count(1) as asset_count, coalesce(sum(af.original_value), 0.00) as original_value_total from asset_info ai left join asset_finance af on af.asset_id = ai.asset_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = ai.use_dept_id where (ai.del_flag is null or ai.del_flag != '2') and ai.asset_status = '1' and ai.use_dept_id is not null group by ai.use_dept_id, sd.dept_name order by asset_count desc, dept_id asc

select ai.asset_id, ai.asset_no, ai.asset_name, ai.asset_type, ai.asset_status, ai.use_dept_id as dept_id, sd.dept_name, null as business_no, null as business_type, null as handler_name, 'IDLE_ASSET' as warning_code, '闲置资产' as warning_label, '资产当前处于闲置状态，请尽快确认继续使用、调拨或处置。' as detail, coalesce(ai.update_time, ai.create_time) as event_time, null as due_date from asset_info ai left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = ai.use_dept_id where (ai.del_flag is null or ai.del_flag != '2') and ai.asset_status = '7' order by coalesce(ai.update_time, ai.create_time) desc, ai.asset_id desc

select ai.asset_id, ai.asset_no, ai.asset_name, ai.asset_type, ai.asset_status, ai.use_dept_id as dept_id, sd.dept_name, am.maintenance_no as business_no, 'asset_maintenance' as business_type, null as handler_name, 'MAINTENANCE_OPEN' as warning_code, '维修中未关闭' as warning_label, concat('维修单 ', am.maintenance_no, ' 仍处于处理中，请确认是否已完成闭环。') as detail, am.create_time as event_time, null as due_date from asset_maintenance am inner join asset_info ai on ai.asset_id = am.asset_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = ai.use_dept_id where (ai.del_flag is null or ai.del_flag != '2') and am.status in (0, 1) order by am.create_time desc, am.maintenance_no desc

select ai.asset_id, ai.asset_no, ai.asset_name, ai.asset_type, ai.asset_status, ai.use_dept_id as dept_id, sd.dept_name, wi.business_id as business_no, wi.business_type, coalesce(su.nick_name, su.user_name, cast(wi.approver_id as char)) as handler_name, 'PENDING_APPROVAL' as warning_code, '待审批关键动作' as warning_label, concat('当前审批人：', coalesce(su.nick_name, su.user_name, cast(wi.approver_id as char))) as detail, wi.create_time as event_time, null as due_date from wf_approval_instance wi left join asset_disposal ad on wi.business_type = 'asset_disposal' and wi.business_id = ad.disposal_no left join asset_requisition ar on wi.business_type = 'asset_requisition' and wi.business_id = ar.requisition_no left join asset_maintenance am on wi.business_type = 'asset_maintenance' and wi.business_id = am.maintenance_no left join asset_real_estate_ownership_change reoc on wi.business_type = 'asset_real_estate_ownership_change' and wi.business_id = reoc.ownership_change_no left join asset_real_estate_disposal red on wi.business_type = 'asset_real_estate_disposal' and wi.business_id = red.disposal_no left join asset_info ai on ai.asset_id = coalesce(ad.asset_id, ar.asset_id, am.asset_id, reoc.asset_id, red.asset_id) left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = ai.use_dept_id left join sys_user su on su.user_id = wi.approver_id where wi.status = 'pending' and wi.business_type in ( 'asset_requisition', 'asset_maintenance', 'asset_disposal', 'asset_real_estate_ownership_change', 'asset_real_estate_disposal' ) and (ai.asset_id is null or ai.del_flag is null or ai.del_flag != '2') order by wi.create_time desc, wi.instance_id desc

select ai.asset_id, ai.asset_no, ai.asset_name, ai.asset_type, ai.asset_status, ai.use_dept_id as dept_id, sd.dept_name, null as business_no, null as business_type, null as handler_name, 'LAND_TERM_EXPIRING' as warning_code, '土地期限即将到期' as warning_label, concat('土地使用期限将于 ', date_format(are.land_term_end_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 到期。') as detail, coalesce(ai.update_time, ai.create_time) as event_time, are.land_term_end_date as due_date from asset_real_estate are inner join asset_info ai on ai.asset_id = are.asset_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = ai.use_dept_id where (ai.del_flag is null or ai.del_flag != '2') and ai.asset_type = '2' and ai.asset_status not in ('5', '6') and are.land_term_end_date is not null and are.land_term_end_date >= curdate() and are.land_term_end_date <= #{thresholdDate} order by are.land_term_end_date asc, ai.asset_id desc
